svg.title: Auth Module — Low-Level Design
svg.desc: Complete architecture diagram of the Utsavs auth module showing OTP request flow, verify flow, token refresh flow, data stores, and component relationships.
svg.text: Rotation: old refresh jti deleted → new jti stored → reusing old token returns 401 ("Token revoked or already used")
This prevents replay attacks: each refresh token is single-use. Stolen token can only be used once before legitimate user detects it.
• Phone normalized to +91XXXXXXXXXX on all paths
• No DB call on JWT validate (trust signed token)
